name: USB-Serial Controller D (Exclamation mark) on Receipt Printer
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can resolve USB serial controller driver issues affecting receipt printer connectivity, restoring reliable receipt printing capabilities through proper driver installation. This helps optimize your retail operations by maintaining continuous receipt printing functionality, preventing checkout delays, and ensuring customers receive transaction documentation."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If a receipt printer has a Serial port to USB adapter and Windows is showing it as a USB-Serial Controller-D with an exclamation mark"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "THERE ARE 2 TYPES OF USB SERIAL ADAPTERS - RECOMMENDED TO TRY BOTH (Aten first)", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Serial port adapter:"}, {"text": ""}, {"type":
